candidates.snippet: rin Tengwar Toshi Omagari En Jp Fonts Non-fonts Blog Profile Name: Alcarin Tengwar Type: Open source font Release year: 2022 Download: Github Alcarin Tengwar is a Tengwar typeface that is designed to match Brill , the ty
ociated with either Koninklijke Brill NV or Tolkien Estate. It also does not contain any graphical elements of Brill. © 2026 Toshi Omagari Facebook Twitter EN Twitter JP Instagram GitHub
